---
title: Workout
description: A multi-screen workout template. A Navigator stack with a self-ticking Timer and a destructive Confirm to end the session, showing focus memory and the back gesture in a real flow.
---

A multi-screen flow: a list of activities pushes a detail screen, a self-ticking
[Timer](/docs/components/timer) runs the set, and ending the session routes
through a destructive [Confirm](/docs/components/confirm). Watch the back gesture
pop a screen and the focus ring return to the row that opened it.
